name: Yorkshire Pudding with Roast Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Cook the rump roast in a 9 x 9" pan for 25 to 30 minutes or until the internal temperature of the meat reaches 150 to 170°F.
3. Sift flour and salt together.
4. Add milk to the flour mixture and whisk until smooth.
5. Add eggs, beating for 2 minutes using an electric mixer.
6. Cover the bottom of the 9 x 9" pan with about 1/4" of drippings from the roast.
7. Pour the batter 1/2" deep over the drippings in the pan.
8. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes.
9. Serve deliciously.
